title: From Waves to Insights: A Visual Exploration of Sound
author: T. Aditya Sai Srinivas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Audio Feature Extraction and Visualization in Python" presents a comprehensive framework for uncovering valuable insights from audio data. Leveraging the power of the `librosa` library, this project demonstrates the extraction of essential audio features, including MFCCs, Chroma, Spectral Contrast, Zero Crossing Rate, and Spectral Centroid. Through insightful visualizations, this work showcases the transformation of raw audio into meaningful data representations. These extracted features offer a deeper understanding of the audio content, enabling applications in speech recognition, music analysis, and beyond. This project invites researchers, developers, and enthusiasts to embark on an auditory journey, revealing the hidden patterns within the realm of sound.

keywords: Audio Feature Extraction, Python, Librosa Library, Visualization, MFCCs, Spectral Contrast, Data Analysis.
